ground_truth.title: 8 Best Online Legal Services for Startups in 2025 | TRUiC
ground_truth.author: TRUiC Team
ground_truth.main_content: Do you require online legal services and documents, but hiring a business attorney isn't in your budget? There are several options for legal services online, but how do you know which providers are trustworthy and reliable? In this comparison of the best online legal services for business, we'll briefly touch on the top options in the industry and a few minutes from now you'll have a good idea of which provider is right for your startup. Startups can significantly benefit from professional online legal services. These platforms offer cost-effective and easily accessible legal solutions tailored for early-stage businesses, eliminating the need for high-priced legal consultations. Best Legal Services for Business in 2025: 1. LegalZoom – Best Online Legal Service Overall 2. Firstbase.io – Best for Startup Incorporation 3. Rocket Lawyer – Best for Solving Complicated Legal Issues 4. Clerky – Best for Fundraising 5. LegalShield – Best for Startups on a Budget 6. Nolo – Best for Legal Documents 7. Northwest – Best for Utah Clients 8. UpCounsel – Best for Finding Startup Lawyers. LegalZoom offers cost-effective legal services for startups and small businesses. Their features include help with the development of a business advisory plan as well as an annual business evaluation. Other notable features include unlimited 30-minute legal consultations, one-hour annual business evaluation, and legal checkups, as well as access to over 150 business and legal forms. LegalZoom is our choice for the best legal service for startups overall. Not only is it an inexpensive option, but it also boasts valuable included features for your startup's legal needs. Firstbase.io is a formation service for startups. Their service, Firstbase Agent, is a registered agent service that also provides compliance support. With Firstbase, you receive automated compliance reminders and a compliance dashboard with document access. Rocket Lawyer is the best legal service for more complex issues. Catering to both individuals and businesses, the platform provides customizable legal forms, attorney advice, and various other legal resources, making legal services more accessible and affordable through its online model. Clerky is dedicated to ensuring startup legal paperwork is done accurately. Their services range from formation to fundraising and everything in between. LegalShield is a pre-paid legal service geared towards small businesses. Nolo offers a DIY approach to startup legal services. On the Nolo website, you can find do-it-yourself legal products such as forms, online documents, resources, and software. Northwest Registered Agent's legal services, Law on Call for Utah clients, is the first non-lawyer-owned law firm in the United States. UpCounsel is a marketplace of freelance attorneys used by over 10,000 businesses ranging from small businesses to large corporations. For small business owners that can't afford a conventional law firm, these subscription-based online legal services deliver huge value. Our favorite is LegalZoom because they offer comprehensive online legal services with great customer service.
with: LegalZoom offers cost-effective legal services for startups and small businesses.
Firstbase.io is a formation service for startups with automated compliance reminders.
Rocket Lawyer provides customizable legal forms and attorney advice.
Our favorite is LegalZoom because they offer comprehensive online legal services with great customer service.
Startups can significantly benefit from professional online legal services.

items.alt: four point eight out of five
